top_signals.title: Asset Purchase Facility: Gilt Sales – Market Notice 19 June 2026
top_signals.summary: This Market Notice sets out the schedule for sales in Q3 2026 of gilts held in the Asset Purchase Facility (APF) for monetary policy purposes.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Banks Get Bids on $49 Billion Paramount Debt Well Before Sale
top_signals.summary: Banks have lined up enough investor demand to cover most of the roughly $49 billion debt package backing Paramount Skydance Corp.’s takeover of Warner Bros. Discovery Inc. — long before launching the deal.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Megan Greene's CV and questionnaire for the Treasury Select Committee
top_signals.summary: Published for the Treasury Select Committee
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: It’s Coming Home − speech by Shoib Khan
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Springbok Emblems May Get Legal Shield Before All Blacks Visit
top_signals.summary: South Africa proposed protecting the commercial rights to the Springboks’ upcoming rugby tour against New Zealand’s All Blacks, a move aimed at safeguarding sponsorship revenue.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Pull an all-nighter for the England World Cup this Sunday at these London bars
top_signals.summary: After a nail-biting game last night Londoners are preparing to watch this weekend’s England World Cup fixture, although the kick off is at the rather unconventional time of 1AM on Monday morning. If you’re staying up on Sunday night into Monday morning to watch the game, there are plenty of options for places to book. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Kongsberg Secures Critical Infrastructure Protection Deal
top_signals.summary: Kongsberg has signed a contract with an unnamed international customer to deliver technologies for the protection of critical infrastructure.The project will focus primarily on underwater surveillance and protection, according to Kongsberg,…
